name: prata0x-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code skills and agents

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Pre-commit and pre-merge code review skills and agents.

plugins.name: security
plugins.description: Project-wide security audit skill and agents, plus a commit-time mechanical security pattern hook.

plugins.name: second-opinion
plugins.description: Delegate read-only review/investigation tasks to GitHub Copilot CLI or OpenAI Codex CLI directly, trigger the autonomous copilot -> codex -> opus fallback chain for a second opinion, or manually escalate one specific task to Fable or Opus via /fable or /opus.

plugins.name: comment
plugins.description: Pre-commit hook that blocks stale-risk comment patterns in staged additions, plus an occasional project-wide comment-audit skill for leakage/narration issues the hook's regex can't catch.

plugins.name: project
plugins.description: Project-wide issue-discovery audit skill and agents — AI-agent friction (CLAUDE.md/docs drift) plus end-user product gaps.

plugins.name: triage
plugins.description: Turns high-confidence findings from security-audit / comment-audit / project-audit into GitHub issues — verifies against the live repo, dedupes against open issues, and creates/comments only after explicit approval.

plugins.name: format
plugins.description: Auto-formats edited files with whatever formatter the target project already has configured; does nothing when none is set up.

plugins.name: response-quality
plugins.description: Stop hooks (type: prompt) that judge whether the final response is written in Japanese and doesn't dangle a reference to content the user never saw, and force a redo when it doesn't hold.
